data.title: Coinbase Earnings Pain Likely as Retail Activity Slumps, Wall Street Analysts Warn
data.description:
• Coinbase may miss Wall Street consensus earnings estimates due to a sharp slowdown in retail crypto trading activity, some analysts said.
  • Subscription revenue from USDC interest and blockchain staking is expected to remain within guidance and partially cushion weaker transaction revenue.
  • While institutional trading and stablecoins provided some support, analysts warn that margins are likely under pressure and retail trends remain fragile heading into the second quarter.

data.title: Bitcoin Payments App Strike to Offer BTC Lending in Boost to Reemergent Sector
data.description:
• Jack Mallers' bitcoin payments app Strike is set to move into the BTC lending business.
  • Strike plans to offer users a means of borrowing fiat while continuing to HODL bitcoin, Mallers wrote.
  • Bitcoin lending could be prime for a resurgence following entry by companies such as Coinbase during the BTC rally that kicked off at the end of last year.

data.title: Revolut to Roll Out Bitcoin Lightning Payments for Europe Users Through Lightspark
data.description:
• Revolut plans to use Lightspark to enable transactions on the Bitcoin-based Lightning Network for users in the U.K. and select European countries.
  • The integration aims to reduce transaction fees and payment processing time by using Lightspark's infrastructure for global payments.
  • This move positions Revolut among fintech firms adopting faster, crypto-native payment systems using blockchain technology.

data.title: Crypto Exchange Gemini Hires Brad Vopni to Lead Institutional Push
data.description:
• Brad Vopni has joined crypto exchange Gemini as head of institutional.
  • He joins from Hudson River Trading.

data.title: Bitcoin Accumulation Strengthens as BTC Approaches Key Resistance
data.description:
• Glassnode reports over 250,000 BTC have been added by long-term holders since March, pushing their total holdings above 14 million BTC, a sign of renewed conviction.
  • Short-term holders have also reversed trend, adding 25K BTC in the past week, following months of distribution during bitcoin’s 30% drawdown.

data.title: Visa Doubles Down on Stablecoins With Investment in Blockchain Payments Firm BVNK
data.description:
• Visa made a strategic investment in BVNK, a startup focused on stablecoin-based payment infrastructure for businesses.
  • BVNK, based in London, said it processes $12 billion in stablecoin transactions annually and is expanding into the U.S.
  • The investment underscores a broader trend of mainstream financial firms adopting blockchain and stablecoins as a faster, cheaper alternative for payments.

data.title: Massive Bitcoin Bull Run Ahead? Two Chart Patterns Mirror BTC's Rally to $109K
data.description:
• Both the MACD and the death cross recently trapped the bears in a pattern observed before the breakout above $70K.
  • A potential golden cross in the coming weeks could signal a bullish trend, similar to the pattern observed last year.

data.title: MOG Coin Rallies as Elon Musk, Garry Tan Embrace ‘Mog/Acc’ Identity
data.description:
• MOG Coin, a popular memecoin on Ethereum and Base, is gaining popularity by promoting a cultural shift called mog/acc, combining mogging and accelerationism.
  • Influential figures like Elon Musk and Garry Tan have embraced the mog/acc trend, boosting MOG Coin's value significantly.
  • Mog/acc is evolving into an internet-native philosophy, focusing on technological progress and a shared language of winning.

data.title: BlackRock’s Spot Bitcoin ETF Tops World’s Largest Gold Fund in Inflows This Year
data.description:
• IBIT has surpassed the SPDR Gold Trust in year-to-date inflows despite BTC's dour price performance.
  • Resilient inflows represents institutional investors' confidence in bitcoin's long-term prospects.

data.title: Metaplanet Lifts Bitcoin Stash by 555 BTC, Plans to Sell Debt to Buy More
data.description:
• Metaplanet will issue $25 million in bonds to fund further purchases of bitcoin.
  • The Tokyo-based company earmarked the entire offering for EVO FUND only days after selling an earlier tranche of $25 million to the same buyer.
  • The company also said it bought 555 BTC, taking its total stash to 5,555.
